prompt: I have a plan for a config file manager CLI at augment-plan-workspace/test-plans/partial-cli-plan.md. The CLI currently just prints formatted text output. Please augment the plan with proper CLI design and scaffolding.

assertions.text: Plan contains a scaffolding milestone for repo structure and guidance files
Plan addresses transforming the existing text/Rich output to structured JSON output on stdout
Plan defines an error code taxonomy with ERR_ prefixed codes
Plan adds --dry-run support to the set command (which mutates config files)
Plan includes backup support before writing config files
Plan mentions atomic writes (temp file + rename pattern)
Plan includes Python-specific implementation hints (Pydantic, Click, or Python idioms)
Plan mentions isatty() detection or terminal-vs-pipe output switching
Progress section has been updated with new unchecked steps
